title: Capable Dialpad for monday.com CRM

posts.author: benhowes (Ben Howes 🐨)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m pleased to announce that the Capable Dialpad integration is now available and is offering the first full integration of monday.com CRM with Dialpad.

The most important 2 features are:

  1. 2-way Contact syncing to Dialpad
  2. Call event tracking from your Dialpad calls

See the app here for more info

CC: @anamtn + @Titus - you showed interest in another developer’s work around Dialpad, so do give it a try or drop me a message with any questions.
